title: CAMMSR: Category-Guided Attentive Mixture of Experts for Multimodal Sequential Recommendation
summary:
The explosion of multimedia data in information-rich environments has intensified the challenges of personalized content discovery, positioning recommendation systems as an essential form of passive data management. Multimodal sequential recommendation, which leverages diverse item information such as text and images, has shown great promise in enriching item representations and deepening the understanding of user interests. However, most existing models rely on heuristic fusion strategies that fail to capture the dynamic and context-sensitive nature of user-modal interactions. In real-world scenarios, user preferences for modalities vary not only across individuals but also within the same user across different items or categories. Moreover, the synergistic effects between modalities-where combined signals trigger user interest in ways isolated modalities cannot-remain largely underexplored.
  To this end, we propose CAMMSR, a Category-guided Attentive Mixture of Experts model for Multimodal Sequential Recommendation. At its core, CAMMSR introduces a category-guided attentive mixture of experts (CAMoE) module, which learns specialized item representations from multiple perspectives and explicitly models inter-modal synergies. This component dynamically allocates modality weights guided by an auxiliary category prediction task, enabling adaptive fusion of multimodal signals. Additionally, we design a modality swap contrastive learning task to enhance cross-modal representation alignment through sequence-level augmentation. Extensive experiments on four public datasets demonstrate that CAMMSR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, validating its effectiveness in achieving adaptive, synergistic, and user-centric multimodal sequential recommendation.

AI.tldr: CAMMSR是一种用于多模态序列推荐的类别引导注意力专家混合模型，通过动态分配模态权重和建模模态间协同效应来提升推荐性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态序列推荐模型大多依赖启发式融合策略，无法捕捉用户-模态交互的动态性和上下文敏感性。用户对模态的偏好不仅因人而异，同一用户在不同物品或类别间也会变化，且模态间的协同效应尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 提出类别引导注意力专家混合模块，通过辅助类别预测任务动态分配模态权重；设计模态交换对比学习任务增强跨模态表示对齐；整合ID、文本和视觉三种模态信息，使用Transformer编码用户兴趣序列。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上的实验表明，CAMMSR在NDCG@10和MRR@10等指标上显著优于现有最先进方法，相对改进最高达15.32%。消融研究验证了各组件的重要性，效率分析显示模型具有竞争力的训练和推理效率。
AI.conclusion: CAMMSR通过类别引导的注意力专家混合机制和模态交换对比学习，实现了自适应、协同和用户中心的多模态序列推荐，为动态融合多模态信号提供了有效框架。
